calendar.matters:
FILING OF STATUS REPORT
Off Calendar May-05-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Attorney for failure to appear and for failure to file the receipt by Bank of America for it's creditors claim. The return date is June 2, 2008 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lazatin.

After further review, the Court will not issue the Order To Show Cause as the Satisfaction and Release Of Claim by Bank of America was filed on May 7, 2008. The matter was taken off calendar.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-07-2008 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-24-2008 Continued To Apr-07-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-10-2008 Continued To Mar-24-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Waiver Of Appraisal By Probate Referee
Off Calendar Aug-21-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: RAY W. SOWARDS, APPEARING FOR PETITIONER
COURT STATES THAT THE LOCAL RULE 1453 ARE THE GUIDELINES THAT GOVERNS THIS MATTER. MATTER DENIED.

JUDGE:JOHN DEARMAN;REPORTER: KATY BERSAMIN,CSR#11722;CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON; BALIFF:M. LOOS

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-14-2007 Granted Per Written Order
